raw_text:
Based on my exploration, the repository auto-instruments all SQLAlchemy queries via `SQLAlchemyInstrumentor().instrument(engine=engine)` (in `src/demo/observability/datastores.py`, wired through `tracing.py`). The new `get_item_by_name` function executes through that same instrumented engine, so it gets a span automatically — no manual instrumentation is the codebase idiom. The query is also bounded (single-row `.first()` with a `WHERE name ==` predicate), not an unbounded scan.

[]
